items.quote: Don’t waste time arguing with idiots. They’ll drag you down to their level and they’ll beat you with experience.
items.author: Mark Twain

items.quote: Prejudice is a great time saver. You can form opinions without having to get the facts.
items.author: E. B. White

items.quote: From the ashes of disaster grow the roses of success.
items.author: Caractacus Potts

items.quote: You can't use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.
items.author: Maya Angelou

items.quote: Absorb what is useful, discard what is not, add what is uniquely your own.
items.author: Bruce Lee
